pi_items.source: setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 defines CAMERA_NAMES array with 'Entrance Camera' at index 1. setup_task.sh line 15 retrieves camera by name 'Entrance Camera'. verifier.py implicitly validates this is the target by checking eventResourceIds contains the camera ID from /tmp/target_camera_id.txt (saved in setup_task.sh line 29). Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'Entrance Camera'.

verifier.py line 47: REQ_TRIGGER_NAME = 'Flag Suspect'. Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'button named Flag Suspect'. setup_task.sh lines 31-50 delete existing 'Flag Suspect' rules to ensure clean state. This is the caption/identifier for the soft trigger button.

verifier.py line 48: REQ_BOOKMARK_TEXT = 'Suspicious Activity'. Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'creates a bookmark named Suspicious Activity'. verifier.py line 102 checks that REQ_BOOKMARK_TEXT appears in action_params of the event rule.

Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states 'for a fixed duration of 30 seconds'. Web search confirmed Nx Witness bookmarks support configurable duration via durationMs parameter (30 seconds = 30,000 milliseconds). This is standard industry practice for bookmark retention on security events. See https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/community/posts/360047951053-Bookmarks-occurring-30-seconds-prior-to-event showing bookmarks with specific time durations.

verifier.py line 49: REQ_EVENT_TYPE = 'softwareTrigger'. This is the API name for Soft Trigger events in Nx Witness. Confirmed in web search results describing 'Soft Trigger' as a tracked event type in event rules.

verifier.py line 50: REQ_ACTION_TYPE = 'bookmarkLog'. This is the API name for creating a bookmark action in Nx Witness event rules. Web search confirmed 'Bookmark' is available as an action in the Rules Engine.

pi_items.metadata_value: Nx Witness VMS by Network Optix
pi_items.verified_value: Nx Witness is a real video management system developed by Network Optix
pi_items.source: https://www.networkoptix.com/nx-witness/features and https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/categories/200190776-Nx-Witness-VMS. Nx Witness is a professional VMS platform supporting event rules, soft triggers, and bookmarks as core features.

privileged_info_summary: This task configures a Soft Trigger named 'Flag Suspect' for the 'Entrance Camera' in Nx Witness, a real video management system by Network Optix. When the trigger button is clicked, it creates a bookmark titled 'Suspicious Activity' with a fixed duration of 30 seconds on the same camera. The task involves setting up an event rule in the Nx Witness Desktop Client or Web Admin using the Event Rules dialog. All metadata values are verified: trigger_name='Flag Suspect', bookmark_title='Suspicious Activity', target_camera_name='Entrance Camera', and expected_duration_sec=30. The underlying system uses synthetic data (testcamera virtual cameras) but the Nx Witness software and feature set are real, industry-standard.
